title: The Killer Bunny
description: A mod that makes killer bunnies naturally spawnable a feature that was removed in Java Edition 1.8 and has never been added back ever since
body:
🐰 The Killer Bunny – Cute... But Deadly!

Ever wondered what happened to Minecraft's infamous Killer Bunny? It's back... and it bites.

🔪 What This Mod Does:

   The Killer Bunny brings back the iconic, removed hostile rabbit — but with a twist:

   🐇 Rare Natural Spawns: Killer Bunnies now have a small chance to spawn naturally among normal rabbit groups.

   🧱 Configurable Spawn Rate: Tweak the spawn chance via the config file to suit your world — from harmless to full bunny apocalypse.

   🥕 Golden Carrot Drops (Optional): When slain, Killer Bunnies may drop golden carrots — if enabled in the config.

  🌎 Biome-Independent: These bunnies can appear anywhere regular rabbits do... so keep your eyes open.

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

🔧 Configuration:

   Edit the config file located in:

   /config/the_killer_bunny-common.toml


Options include:

    - killerBunnySpawnChance — Chance (0.0 to 1.0) for a rabbit to be a Killer Bunny.

    - killerBunnyDropsGoldenCarrot — Enable or disable golden carrot drops.

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

🧩 Compatibility:

    Works with Minecraft 1.21.x and is being ported tp multiple versions including:

    -1.16.x, 1.17.x, 1.18.x, 1.19.x, and 1.20.x series.

📦 Requirements:

    - Minecraft Forge
